title: Crocodile Watches the Pieces Move
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on crocodile watches the pieces move, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Crocodile Watches the Pieces Move. The trapped crew survives Crocodile’s death trap and scrambles to continue the mission before the war reaches Alubarna. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I hate this guy!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Damn it... If I could just get out there, I'd butcher those crocodiles...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid, Zero. We can't get out because the crocodile ate the key!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I know that!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Well then,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's time we excuse ourselves and go on ahead first.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Oh, by the way,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: This room is set to self-destruct itself in 1 hour from now.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Water will soon flood through, laying this secret room at the bottom of Rainbase Lake for eternity.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The lives of a million innocent citizens,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Or that of 4 small-time pirates with no future...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Your chances of saving either are low,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And you'll be wagering with your own heartfelt emotions.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: So I hope you're in the betting mood!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Kuhahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: In such circumstances, I suppose even a princess is powerless to do anything...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It was a pleasure plotting in your kingdom thanks to all the clueless idiots,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Ranging from the hot- headed young rebels to the stubborn old digger in Yuba!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Huh? Are you talking about that shriveled up grandpal?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Do you know him?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Even though his oasis has dried up long since,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: He stubbornly continues to dig, day after day...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hahaha... Doesn't it just make you laugh?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The fool won't give up no matter how many sandstorms come his way...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What was that!?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Let me ask you one thing, Straw-Eat Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: How likely do you think sandstorms would continue to hit the same spot over and over again...?

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: W-what do you mean by that!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Don't tell me he...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Whrrr.!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Grin

summary: This part develops crocodile watches the pieces move and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
